Meet the Ember Heated Blanket. Perfectly warm, irresistibly soft, and made to feel like a dream you never want to wake up from.

Also, four new limited shades just got added to our original collection.

If you still do not see the code, try requesting it again or using a different browser, as some browsers can cause issues with e-commerce stores. You can also try clearing your browser's cache and cookies or using a different device. Let me know if this resolves the issue.

promotions.title: Free Expedited Shipping with $85+

- Free expedited shipping with orders $85+. Place your order with expedited shipping by 11:59 PM PST on 12/17/25 to get your order by 12/24/25.

- Excludes Alaska and Hawaii. 

- Offer exclusive to randco.com. 

- Promotion cannot be applied to previous orders or orders after the promotion period. 

- Offer expires 12/17/2025 at 11:59 PM PST.

escalate: ESC retroactive discount/price adjustment inquiries immediately
ESC if stylists/salons want to carry the products
templates: For any q's about affiliate links, commissions, or salon referral links, use AFQ shortcut
All of the products are unisex, use USX shortcut
drive_to_purchase: Ask the cx what their hair concerns are before making a recommendation!
Make recommendations when cx has specific inquiry, don't send the quiz!
For full haircare regimen inquiries, recommend shampoo, conditioner, and at least one or two other products recommended that align with their need
promo_and_exclusions: When sending a code provide more detail about what the code is valid for!
When sending the promo/code end date, include the time the offer expires as well!
